section_miscategorizations.text: She reports mild wheezes on exam.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is an exam finding, not a patient-reported symptom; placing it in HPI blurs the distinction between subjective history and objective exam.

section_miscategorizations.text: Examination also notes mild back pain.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Back pain is primarily a subjective symptom already described in the history; phrasing it as an exam note in Findings is organizationally awkward but not highly misleading.

section_miscategorizations.text: The doctor diagnoses the patient with COPD. The patient may have COPD.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The two consecutive, conflicting statements (definitive diagnosis vs. possibility) are both assessment content but poorly organized; while not a section error, the internal inconsistency could confuse the diagnostic impression.
